videos.description:
Full post with a guide to clean sensitive documents: https://natesnewsletter.substack.com/p/run-ai-offline-private-files?r=1z4sm5&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=true

videos.title: Applying for jobs stopped working. Here's the fix ⬇️ #ATS #careeradvice #jobmarket #AI
videos.description:
Here is the part the numbers do not tell you: you cannot win this by playing harder. More applications, better keywords, another resume rewrite. All of that just feeds the same broken machine faster, and it is why doing everything "right" still gets you nowhere.

The actual fix is to stop competing inside the pile at all. Instead of being one more document a filter throws out, you build something a hiring manager has to engage with directly, as a person, on your own terms. It is not networking h

videos.title: Codex vs Fable: Which AI Agent Picked the Better Problem?
videos.description:
Full post w/ Guide + Automation Skill:
https://natesnewsletter.substack.com/p/let-ai-pick-what-to-automate?r=1z4sm5&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=true

AI agents are getting good enough to help pick the problem worth automating, not only run the task you hand them. I gave Fable and Codex the same open brief—inspect my real business and build the automation that matters—and they chose different problems.

My Links 🔗
👉🏻 Newsletter: https://natesnewsletter.substack

videos.title: I Rebuilt Hermes’s Best Feature in Claude Code (Steal This)
videos.description: Hermes Agent's most loved feature is its memory, which just happens to be Claude Code's biggest weakness. Instead of switching, I rebuilt Hermes's memory system inside Claude Code in just 10 minutes, keeping the best parts and fixing its flaws. In this video, you'll learn how to build an agent that remembers a decision from six months ago, tells you the exact conversation it came from, and runs on your existing Claude Code plan.

items.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Agent 365 dashboard for managers
items.description: Managers in organizations can now access their Agent 365 data through the Agent Dashboard in Copilot Analytics (Insights), enabling them to understand activity across all agents registered through Agent 365. Customers with Agent 365 and Copilot will now see the Agent 365 Dashboard with the ability to view historical data in Agent Dashboard.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Information Protection - Auto-labeling scale increase for SharePoint and OneDrive
items.description: We are increasing the maximum auto-labeling capacity for SharePoint and OneDrive from 100,000 up to 500,000 files per tenant per day. This helps organizations label and protect more of their data at rest, faster, closing labeling gaps across existing content. With sensitivity labels and protection settings applied to more files sooner, organizations can better prepare their data estate for Microsoft 365 Copilot with greater confidence.

items.title: Outlook: All Day events to show up more clearly in the Mail module Calendar Preview
items.description: We're making it easier to tell when receiving meeting invites that conflict with scheduled Out of Office time or Busy All Day events, on Outlook Web and Outlook for Windows.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: External phone call routing (GCC High, DoD)
items.description: External call routing will provide users the ability to redirect all external phone calls to either voicemail or their unanswered settings.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Use Agent 365 agents within Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat and Declarative Agents
items.description: Agents that are published to Agents 365 are already managed in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center. If the agent implements the Agent2Agent protocol, it can be used as a connected agent for the agents that users build in Agent Builder or Copilot Studio.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Explicit recording and transcription consent for PSTN participants now available in GCC High and DoD
items.description: We are introducing explicit recording and transcription consent support for PSTN participants joining Microsoft Teams meetings in GCC High and DoD environments. This feature is already available in Public and GCC clouds and is now being extended to sovereign environments. After this rollout, when a meeting is being recorded or transcribed, PSTN participants will be prompted to provide explicit consent before they can unmute and participate. If consent is not provided, participants will remain mu

items.title: Microsoft Teams: PowerPoint Live Light theme support
items.description: Presenting PowerPoint slides in Teams just got better. PowerPoint Live now supports light mode, giving presenters the option to present in light, dark, classic, or high contrast mode based on their preferences and system settings.

items.title: Planner: Capabilities in Microsoft Cowork
items.description: You’ll soon be able to bring your Microsoft Planner into Microsoft Cowork. In Cowork, you can view, create, and update your plans, buckets, goals, and tasks without switching apps. Cowork goes a step further by helping you execute your Planner tasks across Microsoft 365, such as drafting and sending emails, scheduling meetings, posting updates to Teams, and working with files. It can then write progress back to Planner with your approval. You can move from planning your work to getting it done i

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention - Data Loss Prevention to safeguard sensitive information from external web search in Microsoft 356 Copilot and Copilot Chat
items.description: We are expanding Microsoft Purview DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat to safeguard web searches containing sensitive data. This real-time control helps organizations mitigate data leakage and oversharing risks by preventing Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat from using sensitive data for external web search.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Breakout rooms up to 1,000 Attendees in Teams meetings
items.description: Organizers can now use breakout rooms in Teams meetings with up to 1,000 attendees, enabling more interactive sessions, smaller group discussions, and improved audience engagement without compromising scale or performance.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Centralized notification settings for channels
items.description: Centralized notification settings streamline channel notification setup and management. Available in Teams settings, users have a single place to review and adjust notifications for all visible channels, instead of managing each individually.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention to prevent Microsoft 365 Copilot processing content with sensitivity labels supports all storage locations
items.description: The Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention policy to restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot processing sensitive files in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint will now apply regardless of file storage location.

items.title: Microsoft Teams: Events in Meet app in Teams
items.description: Users can now use the Teams Meet app to discover events across their organization, track what important events are upcoming, and plan and organize their own professional events.

items.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Agent Mode in Excel for GCC
items.description: Edit with Copilot lets you build and edit workbooks side by side with Copilot. When you're updating budgets, creating financial models, or analyzing data, Agent Mode uses Excel's most powerful tools like tables, charts, PivotTables, and formulas to help you get the job done.

items.title: Microsoft Purview: Integration with Entra GSA Internet Access to enable sensitive file filtering at the network layer
items.description: Extend Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies to filter sensitive files at the network layer by integrating with Entra Global Secure Access Internet Access. This integration enables organizations to intercept and inspect files at the network layer and enforce restrictive actions based on DLP policy conditions. It helps prevent sensitive data from being shared with untrusted cloud applications through browsers, apps, APIs, add-ins, and more - including generative AI platforms, clou

items.title: Microsoft 365 Admin Center: Authoritative content management for Microsoft 365 Copilot Search
items.description: Specify and manage SharePoint sites deemed as authoritative content to enhance their relevance and ranking in Microsoft 365 Copilot Search. In the Microsoft 365 admin center, under Copilot > Search > Authoritative content, add and manage up to 100 SharePoint sites. #copilotcontrolsystem
